metadata.title: Asaan Account | Savings Account | Meezan Bank
metadata.description: Meezan Asaan Savings Account provides swift and hassle-free account opening process, since there is no requirement of submitting any proof of income document for opening this account. Account works on the basis of ‘Mudarabah’ and can be opened with a minimum deposit of Rs 100 and a valid CNIC.

content: Meezan EBiz+ LITE Login Meezan EBiz+ Login EBiz+ LITE Login EBiz+ Login اردو Asaan Savings Account Open an Asaan Savings Account If you found this page informative, share it now! Facebook LinkedIn X WhatsApp Email Print For Customers with Limited Proof of Source of Income The Riba-free Meezan Asaan Savings Account is another addition to the offerings of Meezan bank. Meezan Asaan Account opens the doors of banking products and services to those customers who have limited proof of source of income. The account can be opened with just Rs. 100/- and a valid CNIC/ SNIC / Passport / National Identity Card for Overseas Pakistanis (NICOP) / Pakistan Origin Card (POC) / Alien Registration Card (ARC) issued by National Aliens / Registration Authority (NARA) / Pension Book. (Meezan Savings Account is meant for resident individuals having Pakistani nationality only) Key Features Chequebook Issuance of chequebook in accordance with the Schedule of Charges (SOCs) Free Pay Orders Pay Orders Free Internet Banking Free Internet Banking facility Minimium Deposit Minimum investment required to open an account is Rs. 100/- Free Online Banking Free Online Banking service at all Meezan Bank branches Profit Payment & Calculation Profit will be paid on monthly basis and calculated on daily basis Withdrawals Restriction on withdrawals amount above Rs. 1,000,000/- per month Maximum Credit Balance* Restriction on Maximum credit balance limit of Rs. 3,000,000/- Visa Debit Card Globally accepted Meezan Visa Debit Card *Maximum credit limit not valid in case of Inward Remittance. How the Asaan Savings Account Works Download Fatwa On agreeing to become a Asaan Savings Account holder, the customer enters into a relationship based on Mudarabah with Meezan Bank. Under this relationship, the customer is an Investor (Rab-ul-Maal) and the Bank is the Manager (Mudarib) of the funds deposited by the customers. The Bank allocates the funds received from the customers to a deposit pool; funds from the pool are utilized to provide financing to customers under Islamic modes that include, but are not restricted to Murabaha, Ijarah, Istisna and Diminishing Musharkah. Profit Sharing Ratio Bank will share 50% of Gross Income as Mudarib Depositor Gross Income as Rab-ul-Maal Weightages for the Month of April 2026 Products Tier Groups Weightage Assigned Asaan Savings Account Monthly 0.45 Consolidated Weightages Profit Rates Profit Rates the Month of February 2026 Products Tenure Profit Savings Account Monthly 6.34% Profit Rates Historical Profit Rates Want to Open a Asaan Savings Account? Download, Print, Fill Form PDF version of our printed Account Opening Form is also available for download. You can print the form, fill your details and submit it along with the required documents at your preferred branch. Download Form Visit a Branch You may visit any branch of Meezan Bank and our staff will assist you in filling the Account Opening Form and opening your account. Locate a Branch Get Contacted Fill out the form below to be contacted by a Meezan Bank representative. Get Contacted MeezanGPT Assalam o Alaikum! How can I be of service to you today?
